bool isLowerVowel(char c)
{
    switch (c) // statement 1
    {
    case 'a':
    case 'e':
    case 'i':
    case 'o':
    case 'u':
        return true; // statement 2
    default:
        return false; // statement 3
    }
}

Question #1What is branch coverage?Show SolutionBranch coverage is the percentage of branches that have been executed, with the affirmative case and negative case counting separately.
